posts.text:
We will not let the failures by regional operators like PJM define how Maryland moves at this moment. 

Marylanders deserve affordable energy bills. Full stop. 

Together with Senate President Ferguson and Speaker Peña-Melnyk, we will hold utility companies accountable, move faster to build new energy generation, and deliver $100 million to lower energy bills for Maryland families.

Video

posts.text:
Senate President Bill Ferguson, House Speaker Joseline Peña-Melnyk, and I have announced a comprehensive legislative package to lower energy bills for Marylanders. 

The legislation will help our state generate more energy, hold big utility companies accountable, and – importantly – 𝙨𝙖𝙫𝙚 𝙈𝙖𝙧𝙮𝙡𝙖𝙣𝙙 𝙛𝙖𝙢𝙞𝙡𝙞𝙚𝙨 𝙝𝙪𝙣𝙙𝙧𝙚𝙙𝙨 𝙤𝙣 𝙩𝙝𝙚𝙞𝙧 𝙚𝙣𝙚𝙧𝙜𝙮 𝙗𝙞𝙡𝙡𝙨 𝙚𝙫𝙚𝙧𝙮 𝙮𝙚𝙖𝙧.

posts.text:
I am devastated to learn of yet another attack on a synagogue. At a time when Jewish communities across our country are faced with rising antisemitism, an attack on a house of worship is an attack on the very heart of our nation.

My prayers are with the congregants of Temple Israel and with the entire Michigan Jewish community. Maryland stands in solidarity with you, as we reaffirm that hate has no place in our communities, and we must and we will always speak out against antisemitism wherever

Thank you again to Brother Hammad and everyone at the Islamic Society of Baltimore for hosting @LtGovMiller and I for iftar last night.

A recent report shows that just last year, there were thousands of complaints of anti-Muslim discrimination, the highest number in 30 years. In the last few weeks, we’ve even seen members of Congress post disgusting anti-Muslim hatred. It’s outrageous.

posts.text:
The allegations surrounding the conditions at the George H. Fallon Federal Building in Baltimore are deeply disturbing and merit full investigative cooperation. We cannot stand by as ICE and the federal government continue to dodge accountability for their cruel and unlawful immigration enforcement actions.

In Maryland, we uphold the Constitution. We recognize our solemn obligation to promote public safety and defend civil rights, and we will pursue justice to protect our people.

posts.text:
It’s always great being in the room with Maryland’s police chiefs and law enforcement community because we all hold the same belief: That our people deserve to be safe in their communities.

Our partnership is essential to the state’s success. Homicides are down nearly 50% statewide and our budget proposes a record $124.1 million for the State Aid for Police Protection program to keep up our progress.

posts.text:
The President’s tariffs are unconstitutional and have directly impacted the lives of Marylanders. 

I applaud @OAGMaryland and his team for working to hold the President accountable and for protecting Marylanders from the Trump-Vance Administration.
